scripts.dev:safe: concurrently --kill-others --prefix "[{name}]" --names "VITE,SPRING" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd frontend && npx vite --host 127.0.0.1" ".\mvnw.cmd clean test && .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run"
scripts.dev:fast: concurrently --kill-others --prefix "[{name}]" --names "VITE,SPRING" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd frontend && npx vite --host 127.0.0.1" ".\mvnw.cmd clean spring-boot:run -DskipTests"
